reasoning: The market estimate was at 4% in late October 2025, heavily implying that Apple's fall hardware events passed without any announcement of a Vision Pro successor. Historically, Apple does not release major new hardware in late November or December without prior announcements (usually in September/October or at WWDC). Reliable supply chain analysts like Ming-Chi Kuo previously indicated that the next generation of the Vision Pro was pushed to 2026 or 2027. Combined with the timeline of the initial Vision Pro's release in February 2024 (and its high price point/low volume), the likelihood of a successor launching by December 2025 is negligible. The slight time decay from Oct 30 to Nov 9 without any apparent major news further lowers the baseline from 4% down to roughly 3%.
